opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My left ankle and the top of my foot suddenly ballooned up a few hours ago, the pain is agonising, and I can't put any weight on it.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came up fast and I'm scared it's an infection or a clot.

symptom_narrative.character: rapid severe swelling and pain in the left midfoot/ankle
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: one joint area only; mild redness; no fever/shakes; no trauma; big toe spared
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get fleeting joint flares (palindromic, seropositive RA)

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: seropositive palindromic rheumatism (RF/CCP positive), fleeting flares, no joint damage

objective_data_offered.value: left midfoot/ankle is swollen with some mild redness; the other foot is normal; I can't put weight on it
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: phone-camera view; cannot measure temperature of the joint, examine for effusion, or aspirate remotely
